role: Iranian national; wanted in connection with the 2026 Baku IRGC terror plot
bio: Yaser Rahim Zandkian is an Iranian national placed on an international wanted list by Azerbaijan's State Security Service (DTX) in March 2026. According to Azerbaijani authorities, Zandkian and [Behnam Sahibali Rustamzada](/people/behnam-sahibali-rustamzada) — acting in prior collusion — established criminal contact with an Azerbaijani citizen and organized the smuggling of C-4 explosives into Azerbaijan as part of the [2026 IRGC terror plot in Azerbaijan](/events/azerbaijan-irgc-terror-plot-foiled-2026). Azerbaijani investigators recovered 7.730 kg of C-4 explosive designed to detonate objects and concrete installations. An international arrest warrant was issued for Zandkian for involvement in organizing terror and sabotage acts aimed at destabilizing Azerbaijan.

sources.title: State Security Service foils IRGC terror plots in Azerbaijan
State Security Service exposes IRGC terror plans in Azerbaijan

editorial_notes: Named on international wanted list March 2026 re: BTC pipeline and embassy plot. Iranian national; IRGC affiliation not explicitly confirmed in public sources — only that he acted in coordination with IRGC-directed operatives.
